S.FORM: kawas tay 1923 , ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 6, Max Biggs, squliq na p'unro. (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1990) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kawas~…ï taj **** , rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj *, max Œ≤i…£…£s~…ï, s~…ïquliq na p îunro. (mƒßuqil s~…ïa kawas~…ï taj ****) ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
